name: Dali Memory
description: Semantic memory retrieval from local Dali SQLite vector database. Replaces static workspace file dumps with query-relevant context injection.

dbPath.description: Path to Dali SQLite database file.

ollamaBaseUrl.description: Ollama API base URL for generating embeddings.

maxContextTokens.description: Token budget for injected context per turn.

minRelevance.description: Minimum relevance score (0-1) for memories to be included.

managedFiles.description: Workspace files replaced by Dali retrieval. These get stubbed on indexing.

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Absolute or ~ path to the Dali SQLite database.

ollamaBaseUrl.label: Ollama URL
ollamaBaseUrl.help: Base URL for the Ollama embedding server.

embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.help: Model used for generating vector embeddings.

maxContextTokens.label: Max Context Tokens
maxContextTokens.help: Maximum tokens to inject per turn from Dali memories.

minRelevance.label: Min Relevance
minRelevance.help: Minimum cosine similarity score to include a memory.
